basic_details.job_title: ESIC Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for 42 Specialists, Senior Residents and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: Full Time/Part Time Super Specialists, Full Time/Part Time Specialists, Senior Residents
basic_details.short_information: Employees' State Insurance Corporation (ESIC) Full Time/Part Time Super Specialists, Full Time/Part Time Specialists, Senior Residents Notification 2026 has been released on 29 June 2026 on the official website of ESIC. A total of 42 vacancies have been announced through the ESIC Full Time/Part Time Super Specialists, Full Time/Part Time Specialists, Senior Residents Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 69 years for all posts. Age relaxation will be provided as per rules for reserved categories.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS and DM/DNB (Cardiology), MBBS and MCh/DM/DNB (Medical Oncology), MBBS and PG Degree/Diploma in concerned speciality

content_sections.heading: ESIC Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the ESIC Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download ESIC Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Full Time/Part Time Super Specialist (Cardiology): MBBS and MD, DM/DNB (Cardiology) Full Time/Part Time Super Specialist (Oncology): MBBS and MCh/DM/DNB in Medical Oncology Full Time/Part Time Specialist (General Medicine): MBBS and PG Degree or equivalent in concerned Speciality Full Time/Part Time Specialist (Radiology): MBBS and PG Degree or equivalent in concerned Speciality Full Time/Part Time Specialist (General Surgery): MBBS and PG Degree or equivalent in concerned Speciality Full Time/Part Time Specialist (Pulmonology): MBBS and PG Degree or equivalent in concerned Speciality Full Time/Part Time Specialist (Ophthalmology): MBBS and PG Degree or equivalent in concerned Speciality Full Time/Part Time Specialist (Casualty): MBBS and PG Degree or equivalent in concerned Speciality Full Time/Part Time Specialist (Anaesthesia): MBBS and PG Degree or equivalent in concerned Speciality Senior Resident (General Medicine): PG Degree or PG Diploma in concerned specialty Senior Resident (General Surgery): PG Degree or PG Diploma in concerned specialty Senior Resident (Casualty): PG Degree or PG Diploma in concerned specialty Senior Resident (Anaesthesia): PG Degree or PG Diploma in concerned specialty Senior Resident (OBG): PG Degree or PG Diploma in concerned specialty Senior Resident (ICU): PG Degree or PG Diploma in concerned specialty Senior Resident (Orthopedics): PG Degree or PG Diploma in concerned specialty Senior Resident (Paediatrics): PG Degree or PG Diploma in concerned specialty Senior Resident (Radiology): PG Degree or PG Diploma in concerned specialty Senior Resident (Pulmonology): PG Degree or PG Diploma in concerned specialty Senior Resident (Pathology): PG Degree or PG Diploma in concerned specialty Senior Resident (ENT): PG Degree or PG Diploma in concerned specialty Senior Resident (Ophthalmology): PG Degree or PG Diploma in concerned specialty Senior Resident (Cardiology): PG Degree or PG Diploma in concerned specialty

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 69 years for all posts. Age relaxation will be provided as per rules for reserved categories.

content_sections.heading: Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for ESIC recruitment?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the ESIC recruitment is scheduled to be held on 07 July 2026. Candidates are advised to reach the venue on time with all necessary documents.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in the ESIC recruitment?
faq.answer: There are a total of 42 vacancies announced for various posts including Super Specialists, Specialists, and Senior Residents in the Employees State Insurance Corporation.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum qualification required for the Senior Resident posts?
faq.answer: For Senior Resident posts, candidates must possess a PG Degree or PG Diploma in the concerned specialty. Specific details for each specialty are available in the official notification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for the ESIC recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all the posts announced in this ESIC recruitment drive is 69 years. Age relaxation is applicable for reserved categories as per government norms.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for General/OBC category candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee for General and OBC category candidates is Rs. 250/-. SC/ST candidates need to pay Rs. 50/-, while PwBD and Women candidates are exempted from paying any fee.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for these ESIC posts?
faq.answer: The mode of application for these posts is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview directly at the specified venue on the given date.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary offered for the Super Specialist posts?
faq.answer: The salary for Full Time/Part Time Super Specialist posts ranges from Rs. 200000 to Rs. 240000 per month, depending on the specific specialty and experience.

faq.question: Q8. Which city will the walk-in interview be conducted in?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted in Ernakulam, Kerala. The exact venue address will be mentioned in the official notification PDF.

faq.question: Q9. Are there any relaxations in the age limit for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Yes, age relaxation will be provided for candidates belonging to reserved categories as per the rules and regulations of the government.

faq.question: Q10. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, self-attested photocopies of these documents, ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if any), and category certificates (if applicable).
